text:
is a unit introduced in Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. It is piloted by Hikari Horaki in unison with a dummy plug system.

Profile

An Evangelion unit developed in NERV Germany using leftover body parts from the Evangelion Unit-02, but the project had stalled until the death of 1.9 million people attack by the Lance of Longinus. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 2, chapter 59 . As such, its appearance is nearly identical to Unit-02 except for the white coloring. It used information traded by Kensuke Aida with the Germans for information about the Keel Lorenz visor when he was part of the intelligence department. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 2, chapter 09 

Hikari says that the NERV Germany's team told her that Evangelion Unit-02’s core failed to bind with Heurtebise's original body, so Kyoko soul is with Asuka in Unit-02, but traces might still linger in the Heurtebise, like an imprinting. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 3, chapter 04 

Features

This unit uses new technology from the previous Evangelion units like the Reactor from the UX-1 Allegorica pack and two Q.R. Signums in each shoulder pylons.

The Q.R. Signum also works as a power source. There is no core in this Evangelion due to the construction process. The problem of mental pollution caused by Q.R. Signum is solved by putting half of the control of the Evangelion on the dummy system and initially using drugs to control Hikari.

Weapons

Cross-shaped Spear
Its main armament is a cross-shaped spear capable of generating an A.T. Field from its tip (A place called 情報宮 stores a part of Kodama Horaki, who died and became salt as part of the effects of Longinus Curtain in Europe. 

Sword 
There is also a sword stored in a sheath located near the hips.

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA

EUROII was said to be developed at NERV Berlin, a testbed for multiple Unit-02 weapons and equipment for consideration of it as a combat model. Based in NERV Germany rather than Japan, the Evangelion is piloted by Hikari Horaki who seems to be in a trance as she pilots the Evangelion. She attacks Shinji Ikari inside the Super Evangelion during the relief operation in Hokkaido, it was assisted by the United Nations Armed Forces Religious Riot Control, Third Brigade by using cars that projected gravitational waves, making Super Evangelion unable to stand up as Heurtebise used its spear to attack. Eventually, Super Evangelion managed to stand up and used its arms to rip one of the Heurtebise arms alongside the Q.R. Signum. Instead of disappearing like the previous Angel Carriers, it managed to escape Super Evangelion grasps and bounce back using the palm of the hand back to Heurtebise. It escapes the attack of the multiple Angel Carrier hands in the ground using the wings similar to Allegorica to escape.

Despite NERV Germany's now cold relationship with the former, is shown to assist her old friends and maintain an intimate relationship with Tōji Suzuhara. After the battle on the Moon, both the Evangelion and Hikari are shown to be contaminated by Armaros and Hikari is a more active enemy towards her old friends and NERV Japan.

Trivia

EURO-II is the code name for this Evangelion, Heurtebise is the official designation. Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Volume 2, chapter 59 
In recognition of the international collaboration, it was named with the french name of an angel, unlike the judeo-christian, inspired by the the works of .
In December, 2022 EVANGELION EVOLUTION EV-024 Evangelion EURO-II Heurtebise https://youtu.be/296vSG8S1AM , modeled by Katsuhisa Yamaguchi was released, two year after the prototype was exhibited in Wonder Festival 2020. This release contain 1 Sword, 1 Sword Scabbard, 1 cross-shaped spear, 1 cross spear fixing part, 1 stand and 6 optional hands. https://www.1999.co.jp/10892288
